records.m_Talk_ENG: Who am I speaking to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who am I speaking to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mrs. Diana Freeheart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mrs. Diana Freeheart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mrs. Diana Freeheart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me. We're investigators from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me. We're investigators from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me. We're investigators from the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edwin Freeheart. Is this person your husband?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Edwin Freeheart. Is this person your husband?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Edwin Freeheart. Is this person your husband?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... He is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... He is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... He is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's probably working at the lab right now. What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's probably working at the lab right now. What brings you here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's probably working at the lab right now. What brings you here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're sorry to tell you this news, but your husband is currently missing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're sorry to tell you this news, but your husband is currently missing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're sorry to tell you this news, but your husband is currently missing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're looking to pull a scam, you've got the wrong person. I've been working for three nights straight and I'm extremely tired.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're looking to pull a scam, you've got the wrong person. I've been working for three nights straight and I'm extremely tired.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're looking to pull a scam, you've got the wrong person. I've been working for three nights straight and I'm extremely tired.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edwin Freeheart is currently wanted worldwide for violating the Administration's technology security policies. You can see it on TV right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Edwin Freeheart is currently wanted worldwide for violating the Administration's technology security policies. You can see it on TV right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Edwin Freeheart is currently wanted worldwide for violating the Administration's technology security policies. You can see it on TV right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? What are you talking about...? I don't quite understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? What are you talking about...? I don't quite understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? What are you talking about...? I don't quite understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm afraid we can't share the details with you as they are classified.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm afraid we can't share the details with you as they are classified.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm afraid we can't share the details with you as they are classified.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If your husband returns, please let us know. We'll help you avoid getting involved in any potential danger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If your husband returns, please let us know. We'll help you avoid getting involved in any potential danger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If your husband returns, please let us know. We'll help you avoid getting involved in any potential danger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He does research on the Corruption in order to save lives. What exactly did he do wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: He does research on the Corruption in order to save lives. What exactly did he do wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: He does research on the Corruption in order to save lives. What exactly did he do wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Last night, covert human experiments conducted by the Northern Union in the Counterside were discovered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Last night, covert human experiments conducted by the Northern Union in the Counterside were discovered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Last night, covert human experiments conducted by the Northern Union in the Counterside were discovered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a large-scale project aiming to artificially manipulate C.O.s. Which also involved human experimentation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a large-scale project aiming to artificially manipulate C.O.s. Which also involved human experimentation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a large-scale project aiming to artificially manipulate C.O.s. Which also involved human experimentation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? That can't be. My husband has no ties to the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? That can't be. My husband has no ties to the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? That can't be. My husband has no ties to the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union announced that Edwin Freeheart was their chief consultant and supervisor of that project.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union announced that Edwin Freeheart was their chief consultant and supervisor of that project.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union announced that Edwin Freeheart was their chief consultant and supervisor of that project.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My husband is someone who cherishes his family.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My husband is someone who cherishes his family.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My husband is someone who cherishes his family.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying that such a person committed crimes while deceiving his family?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying that such a person committed crimes while deceiving his family?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying that such a person committed crimes while deceiving his family?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union is known for not hesitating to use any means necessary. We haven't ruled out the possibility that he may have been taken advantage of by them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union is known for not hesitating to use any means necessary. We haven't ruled out the possibility that he may have been taken advantage of by them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union is known for not hesitating to use any means necessary. We haven't ruled out the possibility that he may have been taken advantage of by them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we're here to help. If you ever get in touch with your husband, please follow the instructions we give you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we're here to help. If you ever get in touch with your husband, please follow the instructions we give you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we're here to help. If you ever get in touch with your husband, please follow the instructions we give you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... hold on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... hold on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... hold on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm getting a call from the hospital where my daughter is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm getting a call from the hospital where my daughter is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm getting a call from the hospital where my daughter is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Breaking news.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Breaking news.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Breaking news.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Excuse me
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Excuse me
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Excuse me
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She disappeared? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She disappeared? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She disappeared? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Last night, research data violating the Administration's policy was discovered in a military zone located in the Northern Union.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Last night, research data violating the Administration's policy was discovered in a military zone located in the Northern Union.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Last night, research data violating the Administration's policy was discovered in a military zone located in the Northern Union.</color>

records.m_Talk_DEU: Her guardian... took her away a week ago?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her guardian... took her away a week ago?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a minute...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a minute...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a minute...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
How... could this
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
How... could this
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
How... could this
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The Foreign Affairs Ministry of the Northern Union rebutted, stating that this project has no relation to national affairs...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The Foreign Affairs Ministry of the Northern Union rebutted, stating that this project has no relation to national affairs...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The Foreign Affairs Ministry of the Northern Union rebutted, stating that this project has no relation to national affairs...</color>

records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>...agreeing to provide a list of overseas nationals who were involved in the project and to issue warrants for their arrest.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>...agreeing to provide a list of overseas nationals who were involved in the project and to issue warrants for their arrest.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, she's awake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, she's awake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, she's awake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew. Looks like the bleeding stopped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew. Looks like the bleeding stopped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew. Looks like the bleeding stopped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hicks...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hicks...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hicks...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long was I out for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long was I out for?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long was I out for?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, about two hours?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, about two hours?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, about two hours?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We wasted too much time. We need to go back quickly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We wasted too much time. We need to go back quickly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We wasted too much time. We need to go back quickly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urrggh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urrggh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urrggh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, be careful. You fell from quite the height.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, be careful. You fell from quite the height.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, be careful. You fell from quite the height.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, good thing the suit was sturdy enough to keep you alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, good thing the suit was sturdy enough to keep you alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, good thing the suit was sturdy enough to keep you alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I feel fine. I was just a bit dizzy from the withdrawal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I feel fine. I was just a bit dizzy from the withdrawal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I feel fine. I was just a bit dizzy from the withdrawal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huu...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huu...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huu...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That shot... it's purified Eternium liquid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That shot... it's purified Eternium liquid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That shot... it's purified Eternium liquid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption Syndrome. Right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption Syndrome. Right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption Syndrome. Right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it's something you get when you ride down the elevator regularly for over five years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it's something you get when you ride down the elevator regularly for over five years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it's something you get when you ride down the elevator regularly for over five years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm surprised you know about it. Most people just think I'm a drug addict.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm surprised you know about it. Most people just think I'm a drug addict.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm surprised you know about it. Most people just think I'm a drug addict.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Both my brother and I had it before. But we couldn't afford many shots, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Both my brother and I had it before. But we couldn't afford many shots, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Both my brother and I had it before. But we couldn't afford many shots, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did becoming a Counter help you beat it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did becoming a Counter help you beat it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did becoming a Counter help you beat it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard of rare cases like that, but I didn't expect to see one here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard of rare cases like that, but I didn't expect to see one here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard of rare cases like that, but I didn't expect to see one here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. That's how I'm still alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. That's how I'm still alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. That's how I'm still alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I always felt regretful. It would've been better if my brother became a Counter instead of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I always felt regretful. It would've been better if my brother became a Counter instead of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I always felt regretful. It would've been better if my brother became a Counter instead of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where are the other guys?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are the other guys?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are the other guys?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I jumped right after you when you fell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I jumped right after you when you fell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I jumped right after you when you fell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you didn't get hurt? Counters sure are tough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you didn't get hurt? Counters sure are tough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you didn't get hurt? Counters sure are tough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not quite. I broke a shinbone and passed out for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not quite. I broke a shinbone and passed out for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not quite. I broke a shinbone and passed out for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heal fast so I'm okay now, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heal fast so I'm okay now, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heal fast so I'm okay now, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You went through all that... for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You went through all that... for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You went through all that... for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, my mission is to protect you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, my mission is to protect you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, my mission is to protect you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, get on my back. I'll get us back up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, get on my back. I'll get us back up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, get on my back. I'll get us back up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hold on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hold on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hold on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just heard a voice coming from there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just heard a voice coming from there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just heard a voice coming from there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A voice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A voice?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Hicks...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hicks...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How long was I out for?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How long was I out for?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How long was I out for?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, about two hours?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, about two hours?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, about two hours?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We wasted too much time. We need to go back quickly...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We wasted too much time. We need to go back quickly...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We wasted too much time. We need to go back quickly...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Urrggh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Urrggh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Urrggh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, be careful. You fell from quite the height.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, be careful. You fell from quite the height.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, be careful. You fell from quite the height.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, good thing the suit was sturdy enough to keep you alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, good thing the suit was sturdy enough to keep you alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, good thing the suit was sturdy enough to keep you alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I feel fine. I was just a bit dizzy from the withdrawal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I feel fine. I was just a bit dizzy from the withdrawal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I feel fine. I was just a bit dizzy from the withdrawal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huu...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huu...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huu...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That shot... it's purified Eternium liquid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That shot... it's purified Eternium liquid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That shot... it's purified Eternium liquid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption Syndrome. Right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption Syndrome. Right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption Syndrome. Right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it's something you get when you ride down the elevator regularly for over five years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it's something you get when you ride down the elevator regularly for over five years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it's something you get when you ride down the elevator regularly for over five years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm surprised you know about it. Most people just think I'm a drug addict.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm surprised you know about it. Most people just think I'm a drug addict.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm surprised you know about it. Most people just think I'm a drug addict.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Both my brother and I had it before. But we couldn't afford many shots, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Both my brother and I had it before. But we couldn't afford many shots, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Both my brother and I had it before. But we couldn't afford many shots, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did becoming a Counter help you beat it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did becoming a Counter help you beat it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did becoming a Counter help you beat it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard of rare cases like that, but I didn't expect to see one here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard of rare cases like that, but I didn't expect to see one here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard of rare cases like that, but I didn't expect to see one here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. That's how I'm still alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. That's how I'm still alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. That's how I'm still alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I always felt regretful. It would've been better if my brother became a Counter instead of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I always felt regretful. It would've been better if my brother became a Counter instead of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I always felt regretful. It would've been better if my brother became a Counter instead of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where are the other guys?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where are the other guys?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where are the other guys?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I jumped right after you when you fell.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I jumped right after you when you fell.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I jumped right after you when you fell.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you didn't get hurt? Counters sure are tough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you didn't get hurt? Counters sure are tough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you didn't get hurt? Counters sure are tough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not quite. I broke a shinbone and passed out for a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not quite. I broke a shinbone and passed out for a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not quite. I broke a shinbone and passed out for a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heal fast so I'm okay now, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heal fast so I'm okay now, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heal fast so I'm okay now, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You went through all that... for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You went through all that... for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You went through all that... for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, my mission is to protect you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, my mission is to protect you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, my mission is to protect you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, get on my back. I'll get us back up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, get on my back. I'll get us back up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, get on my back. I'll get us back up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hold on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hold on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hold on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just heard a voice coming from there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just heard a voice coming from there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just heard a voice coming from there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A voice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A voice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A voice?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
This is
8v! Stipple Jason Expedition! Does anyone copy?!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
This is
8v! Stipple Jason Expedition! Does anyone copy?!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
This is
8v! Stipple Jason Expedition! Does anyone copy?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've been ambushed by an unidentified enemy! Please, anyone, help us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've been ambushed by an unidentified enemy! Please, anyone, help us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've been ambushed by an unidentified enemy! Please, anyone, help us!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
This is
8v! Stipple Jason Expedition! Does anyone copy?!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
This is
8v! Stipple Jason Expedition! Does anyone copy?!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
This is
8v! Stipple Jason Expedition! Does anyone copy?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's on auto-repeat...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's on auto-repeat...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's on auto-repeat...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The signal's been coming from here all along.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The signal's been coming from here all along.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The signal's been coming from here all along.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are corpses gathered here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are corpses gathered here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are corpses gathered here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The coordinates match the ones I received from the distress call a few days ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The coordinates match the ones I received from the distress call a few days ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The coordinates match the ones I received from the distress call a few days ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't think we'd run into the advance party like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't think we'd run into the advance party like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't think we'd run into the advance party like this.
